Our Story

Born in a backyard,
loved by Sainikpuri

What started as a passion project with garden chairs and great coffee has grown into Sainikpuri's most talked-about café. Nestled in Shaili Gardens, Backyard Cafe blends a boutique restaurant experience with the warmth of a neighbourhood hangout.

From global cuisine and craft brews to live sports screenings and private events — every visit is a new experience in the same beloved backyard.

Craft Coffee

Espresso to manual brews — every cup made with care.

Fresh Flavours

Global cuisine meets local love — bold, fresh, to order.

Open-Air Vibes

Fairy lights, plants, and an ambience that relaxes you.

Community Hub

Sports, events, pets welcome — Sainikpuri's living room.

✦

Private Bookings

Host your moments with us

Our open-air backyard transforms into the perfect venue — from intimate birthday lunches to corporate gatherings and live sports nights.

🎂

Birthday Celebrations

Décor, custom cakes, and a curated menu for your special day.

💼

Corporate Lunches

Private seating for up to 40 guests with tailored catering packages.

🌸

Kitty Parties

Themed snack spreads, unlimited chai, and a cosy backyard setup.

📺

Sports Screening Events

Live match screenings with group seating, pitchers, and stadium-style fun.

What Guests Say

Loved by Sainikpuri

4.1
★★★★☆
Google Reviews · Backyard Cafe, Sainikpuri, Secunderabad
★★★★★

Absolutely love the vibe here! The open-air seating with fairy lights is magical in the evening. The Orange Espresso is unlike anything I've had in Hyderabad. Great place to hang with friends or even bring your dog!

RK
Ravi Kumar
2 weeks ago · Google Review
★★★★☆

We hosted our team outing here and the staff went above and beyond. Drums of Heaven and Peri Peri Wings were a huge hit. The live sports screen made it feel like a proper event. Will definitely book again!

PM
Priya Mehta
1 month ago · Google Review
★★★★☆

Hidden gem in Sainikpuri! The art wall inside is super cool and the Brownie Sizzler is to die for. Evening ambience is magical. Great value for money. Highly recommend to anyone who hasn't tried it yet!

SP
Suresh Patel
3 weeks ago · Google Review
